title: Luggage Storage in Berlin - Quick Summary
items: **Four reliable options:** Deutsche Bahn lockers at stations, the staffed Gepäckcenter at Hauptbahnhof, BER airport luggage storage, and app-based networks (Bounce, Radical Storage, Stasher).
**Hauptbahnhof is the strongest official locker bet.** DB currently lists 616 small 24-hour lockers at €4 and 396 large 24-hour lockers at €6 there.
**The Hauptbahnhof Gepäckcenter** (Rail&Fresh) costs around 5 to 7 euros per piece for a few hours. Best for oversized, fragile, or valuable bags.
**Use the route logic:** Hauptbahnhof for central train days, Alexanderplatz/Friedrichstraße for Mitte, BER only when the airport remains part of the day, and ZOB for coach arrivals.
**App-based storage (Bounce, Radical, Stasher)** costs around 5 to 8 euros per bag per day. Drop at a partner hotel, cafe, or shop.
**Most hotels store bags after check-out for free.** Ask at check-in, not check-out, so you can plan the day.
